episodes.title: Cult Isolation & Unhealthy Dependency.
episodes.description:
Many cultic or high-control groups use isolation from the outside world as their primary weapon.
But why does isolation create psychological dependency?
And how does a normal person end up feeling like they “can’t function” without the group or the leader?

In this video, I explain:

How cults slowly cut you off from family, friends, and outside support
Why isolation makes you more vulnerable to control
The psychological mechanisms behind dependency
How “thought reform” works when you have no external reality-check
How spiritual, religious, narcissistic and toxic groups use the same tactics
How survivors can begin breaking free mentally

If you grew up in a controlling environment, experienced spiritual abuse, or lived with a narcissistic partner or community, this video will help you understand the trauma bond and dependency cycle with compassion and clarity.

⭐ If this content supports your healing, subscribe for more videos on trauma, spiritual abuse, CPTSD, cult psychology, and empowerment.
